paused_at: Phase 2.5 planning complete. Ready for execution.
completed_work: ✓ All 14 FEED requirements mapped to tasks
next_actions: 1. EXECUTE PHASE 2 FIRST (if not already done): /gsd:execute-phase 2
4. Monitor Wave 2 completion (experiment design + reanalysis loop)

critical_dependencies.phase_2_prerequisite: SLACK_BOT_TOKEN must be configured in .env (from Phase 2-01 execution)
critical_dependencies.mitigation: Add token validation guard: if not slack_bot_token: raise ValueError('SLACK_BOT_TOKEN required')

wave_1.objective: Build feedback infrastructure (creative + cohort analysis, weekly Slack alerts)

feedback_agent.scope_1_creative: Analyzes creative variants (A/B/C) per cohort. Generates hypotheses: why does angle X outperform Y?
feedback_agent.scope_2_cohorts: Identifies underperforming cohorts (CPA > 2σ or CTR ↓). Posts weekly Slack alert with recommendations.

experiment_scientist_agent.outputs: test_directive to ad-creative-brief-generator (80/20 baseline vs test rule)

integration_points: ad-creative-brief-generator receives test directive, uses test variant 20% of time
outlier_data_analyst triggered by Slack reaction to rerun Stage A on fresh data
campaign-manager receives new cohort definitions and schedules campaigns
Weekly cycle: analyze → decide → test → collect results → next analysis

phase_2_5_requirements: FEED-01: feedback_agent reads creative performance from VIEW.LINKEDIN_CREATIVE_COSTS
FEED-05: feedback_agent reads cohort metrics from VIEW.APPLICATION_CONVERSION
FEED-07: feedback_agent posts weekly Slack alert
FEED-08: User acknowledges Slack alert (pause or test)
FEED-09: Reanalysis triggered by user action
FEED-10: New cohorts discovered from fresh data
FEED-11: campaign-manager schedules campaigns for new cohorts
FEED-14: Test results fed back to feedback_agent

verification_gate.blocker: Phase 2 prerequisite not met (Slack Bot Token setup)
warnings: Plan 02.5-03 should document competitor_intel as optional

session_summary.what_happened: Created comprehensive Phase 2.5 (Feedback Loops & Experimentation) planning including PRD, CONTEXT, and 4 detailed executable plans covering feedback agents and experiment workflows.
session_summary.why_phase_2_5: Enables continuous optimization through weekly feedback loops that guide creative iteration and cohort expansion decisions.
session_summary.two_new_agents: feedback_agent (analyze performance, generate hypotheses), experiment_scientist_agent (design tests, maintain backlog)
session_summary.integration: Feeds creative hypotheses and cohort insights into brief generator (20% test / 80% baseline), triggers reanalysis on user feedback.
